hypothesis: A fused kernel should reduce Python/dispatch overhead while preserving correctness.
notes: Setup scaffold only; no model loading and no inference.
Run Discover from ZMLX once kernels are ready to be searched.
question: Can we fuse all-head active-row permute-window attention into one Metal dispatch to eliminate Python head-chunk x query-chunk overhead?
